violations.description: STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Observed clean utensils noted stored in a bin with debris build up.
FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Pork shredded cheeses fresh salsa's and guacamole noted not being held at 41 degrees fahrenheit or below.
COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Prep cooler in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Observed food temperatures at 59 - 64 degrees F.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with dishes sitting on a short shelf in front of the sink.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Onions and other food items noted being stored on the floor in open crates in the kitchen under the convection oven.
